essence: Builds the internal structure of modern buildings through precise installation of plasterboard, partitions, and interior framing.

identity.title: Dryliner
identity.summary: Installs plasterboard, partitions, and interior wall systems in residential and commercial buildings, creating smooth, ready-to-finish internal surfaces.

salary.notes: Specialists in commercial fit-outs, suspended ceilings, or complex partition systems can exceed £45k-£55k+.

qualifications: Apprenticeship or Level 2/3 Diploma in Interior Systems or Drylining
Training in manual handling and site safety
Knowledge of plasterboard systems, studwork, and fixings
Good measurement accuracy and practical problem-solving

lifestyle.description: Dryliners work on interior construction projects installing plasterboard, metal stud partitions, and suspended ceilings. Days involve measuring and marking layouts, fixing boards to frames, cutting openings, insulating cavities, and preparing surfaces for plastering or finishing. The role is physical, detail-oriented, and often fast-paced on commercial fit-out sites. This lifestyle suits individuals who enjoy hands-on building work, precision, and transforming empty shells into usable interior spaces.
